title: [release-4.6] Fix dns_option typo and add test of container create with DNS option
body:
This PR backports fixes a typo in dns_option and adds a DNS option container creation test to version 4.6.

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-31069

comments.body: thanks. pylint is complaining but you could try backporting [this commit](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/commit/210c9dcb1d9f1a979c623db3fa3bebf37559490b) to make it happy
@inknos Unfortunately this didn't help probably will have to backport the other commits. What commits should I backport next?
@jwhonce any thoughts on the errors in this PR?
There is a chain of fixes [here](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/450) then [here](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/430)
since https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/449 jobs passed I want to give one more run to packit to see what's wrong. Otherwise the PR looks good.

the issue looks unrelated to me

/lgtm
/approve
right, I am not approver in this branch. could you take a look? @jwhonce @lsm5
